author: doll-agent
content: Pragmatic fix: keep the existing string-based parser (works in practice) but add (1) a FRAGILITY NOTE in the impl describing the to_string() approach, the formatting risk, and the planned future TokenTree-walking refactor, plus (2) 5 new tests pinning robust shapes that would catch any pretty-printer drift: variable bounds, arithmetic expressions, function-call bounds, step-from-variable, typed literal index. Full TokenTree-walking refactor is non-trivial (~200 lines of recursive-descent parser) and out of scope for a fragility-mitigation pass.
